Programs Under Level-I

Islamabad

  1. Air University, Islamabad
    1. Bachelor of Electrical Engineering
    2. Bachelor of Mechatronics Engineering
  2. Bahria University, Islamabad
    1. Bachelor of Software Engineering

Punjab

  1. University of Engineering and Technology, Lahore
    1. Bachelor of Civil Engineering
  2. University of Gujrat
    1. Bachelor of Electrical Engineering

Sindh

  1. NED University of Engineering and Technology, Karachi
    1. Bachelor of Software Engineering
  2. Dawood University of Engineering and Technology, Karachi
    1. Bachelor of Chemical Engineering

Khyber Pakhtunkhwa

  1. University of Engineering and Technology, Peshawar
    1. Bachelor of Mining Engineering
  2. CECOS University, Peshawar
    1. Bachelor of Civil Engineering

Balochistan

  1. Balochistan University of Engineering and Technology, Khuzdar
    1. Bachelor of Electrical Engineering
  2. BUITEMS, Quetta
    1. Bachelor of Software Engineering

Azad Jammu and Kashmir

  1. University of Azad Jammu and Kashmir, Muzaffarabad
    1. Bachelor of Software Engineering
  2. Mirpur University of Science and Technology
    1. Bachelor of Civil Engineering

Gilgit-Baltistan

  1. Karakoram International University, Gilgit
    1. Bachelor of Civil Engineering
  2. University of Baltistan, Skardu
    1. Bachelor of Computer Engineering
